system.description: When you are in good standing with your Organization, and you have the means to contact them, once per Session, roll +Brains.

failure.value: They ask you to do something bad or give what they think you should want.

partial.value: They will give you the help they ask for, but they will give you a task to accomplish as well. If you refuse or fail the task, you will be in trouble with the Organization.

success.value: They provide some useful info or help in the field.

critical.value: They provide some useful info or help in the field, and you get an Edge.
